Simple, transparent pricing

Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

Starter
Free
forever
  • Up to 3 domains
  • Up to 25 mailboxes
  • Admin dashboard
  • DKIM/SPF/DMARC
  • Automatic TLS
  • Backup & restore
  • Sending API (100/day)
  • Community support
Get Started
Pro
$29
per server / month
  • Unlimited domains
  • Unlimited mailboxes
  • Everything in Starter, plus:
  • Sending API (unlimited)
  • Inbound webhooks (full body)
  • Batch sending
  • Per-domain analytics
  • Webmail (Roundcube)
  • Sieve filter management
  • Prometheus + Grafana
  • Loki log aggregation
  • IP warmup & RBL monitoring
  • OIDC SSO
  • Priority email support
Start Pro Trial
Enterprise
$149
per server / month
  • Everything in Pro, plus:
  • Multi-node clustering
  • PgBouncer connection pooling
  • Rolling updates
  • Cross-node health checks
  • SAML & Azure AD SSO
  • Multi-tenant architecture
  • Email retention & legal hold
  • Compliance audit export
  • Dedicated support
  • SLA guarantee
Contact Sales

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a license to use Vectis Mail?

The Starter tier is free forever with no license required. Pro and Enterprise tiers are licensed through ValidonX, our licensing and billing platform.

What happens if my license expires?

Your mail server keeps running. All core mail delivery (Postfix, Dovecot) continues working. Pro/Enterprise features are gated but your data is never locked. There is a 30-day grace period.

Can I self-host without any external dependencies?

Yes. The Starter tier works fully offline. Pro/Enterprise check ValidonX for entitlements, with a 30-day offline grace period and cached entitlements in Postgres.

What server do I need?

Minimum: 2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM, 40 GB SSD, Ubuntu 22.04+. Recommended for production: 4 vCPU, 8 GB RAM, 100 GB SSD. Any VPS provider works.
